response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and determined it consists of an intro talk (00:00-03:14) and a vocal performance (03:14-05:01). 2. Identified the song title as 'ちゅ。多様性。' from the on-screen text at 03:15. 3. Used web search to identify the original composer as Shuichi Mabe (真部脩一). 4. Searched for the full lyrics in Japanese and a reliable English translation. 5. Mapped the scenes, resolved all metadata fields, and formatted the output as JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introduction talk followed by a musical performance of the song 'ちゅ。多様性。' (Chu. Tayousei.) by FuwaMoco and their host.

scenes.description: An introductory talk and skit featuring the two VTubers, FuwaMoco, and a male host on a colorful, balloon-filled stage.
The song 'ちゅ。多様性。' (Chu. Tayousei.) is performed by FuwaMoco and their host. The lyrics and music are credited to 真部脩一 (Shuichi Mabe).
